games.title: Void Assault
games.description: Survive endless waves of alien enemies in deep space. Defeat elite foes to earn powerful ability upgrades and level up your ship from Scout to Battlecruiser.

achievements.label: Ability Collector
achievements.desc: Unlock 5 different abilities in a run

games.title: Mountain Goat Climber
games.description: Hop your way up an infinite mountain through Meadow, Forest, Cliffs, Snow, Storm, and Peak. Earn coins, unlock cosmetics, and set a new high score.

games.title: Poke Clash
games.description: A strategic turn-based Pokemon battle game. Build your team, exploit type advantages, and outplay your opponent in energy-based combat. Supports PvP and vs-bot modes.

achievements.label: Victorious
achievements.desc: Win your first match vs AI

achievements.label: Unmatched
achievements.desc: Win a match against hard AI

achievements.label: Pokedex Pro
achievements.desc: Use 15 different Pokemon across all battles

achievements.label: Sudden Death
achievements.desc: Trigger sudden death in a battle

games.title: Checkers
games.description: Classic checkers with smooth animations and a minimax bot. Play vs the AI on Easy, Medium, or Hard - or go head-to-head with a friend in local multiplayer.

achievements.label: Opening Move
achievements.desc: Play your first game of Checkers

achievements.label: Outsmarted
achievements.desc: Beat the bot for the first time

achievements.label: Grand Master
achievements.desc: Beat the bot on Hard difficulty

achievements.label: Chain Reaction
achievements.desc: Capture 3+ pieces in a single turn

achievements.label: Flawless
achievements.desc: Win while losing 8 or fewer pieces

games.title: Derpy Bird
games.description: Guide a bug-eyed bird through an endless gauntlet of pipes. Tap to flap, collect coins, and unlock hats, trails, and skins from the in-game shop.

games.title: The Backrooms
games.description: Navigate 50 levels of procedurally-generated liminal mazes while evading a relentless entity. Sneak, hide in lockers, and find the exit before it finds you.

achievements.label: Don't Look
achievements.desc: Enter the Backrooms for the first time

achievements.label: Escaped
achievements.desc: Survive all 50 levels and escape the backrooms

games.title: Hero's Quest
games.description: Battle through 10 worlds of platforming action - stomp enemies, collect coins, and take down the Demon King in an epic final boss fight.

achievements.label: Treasure Hunter
achievements.desc: Collect 30 coins in a single run

achievements.label: Boss Slayer
achievements.desc: Defeat the Demon King and save the kingdom

achievements.label: Gold Rush
achievements.desc: Collect 500 total coins across all runs

achievements.label: Deathless
achievements.desc: Beat the boss without losing a single life

games.title: Chess
games.description: Full chess with castling, en passant, and pawn promotion. Play against a minimax bot on Easy, Medium, or Hard — or challenge a friend in local multiplayer.

achievements.label: First Move
achievements.desc: Play your first game of Chess

achievements.label: Outsmarted
achievements.desc: Win a game against the bot

achievements.label: Grand Master
achievements.desc: Defeat the bot on Hard or Expert difficulty

achievements.label: Safety First
achievements.desc: Castle your king in a game

games.title: Black Knight
games.description: A dark roguelite where you arm the Black Knight and descend through cursed dungeon floors, building a card deck to survive increasingly brutal enemies. Choose your weapon, master your spells, and face the Crypt Lord.

achievements.label: Into the Dark
achievements.desc: Start your first descent into the dungeon

achievements.label: Blade of Ruin
achievements.desc: Deal 50 total kills across all runs

achievements.label: Ascendant
achievements.desc: Reach player level 10 in a single run

games.title: Connect 4
games.description: Drop discs, block your opponent, and connect four in a row before they do. Play local or go head-to-head against a bot from easy random to unforgiving Minimax.

achievements.label: Bot Slayer
achievements.desc: Beat the bot for the first time

achievements.label: Series Champ
achievements.desc: Win a Best of 3 or Best of 5 series

achievements.label: Clean Sweep
achievements.desc: Win a series without dropping a single game

games.description: Slide tiles on a 4×4 grid to merge matching numbers and reach the legendary 2048 tile. Every move counts — plan ahead or watch the board fill up.

games.title: Ultimate Tic-Tac-Toe
games.description: A 9-board recursion of Tic-Tac-Toe where every move sends your opponent to a specific board. Win three boards in a row to claim the meta-grid — and the match.

achievements.label: Outsmarted
achievements.desc: Beat the bot for the first time

achievements.label: Dominator
achievements.desc: Win without the opponent claiming any small board

games.title: Battleship
games.description: Deploy your fleet and wage naval warfare on a 10×10 grid. Hunt enemy ships through fog of war — choose Ensign, Commander, or Admiral difficulty, or battle a friend in local multiplayer.

achievements.label: Target Destroyed
achievements.desc: Win your first battle against the AI

achievements.label: Full Salvo
achievements.desc: Sink all 5 enemy ships in a single game

achievements.label: Unscathed
achievements.desc: Win without losing a single ship

games.title: Minefield
games.description: Clear a minefield by revealing safe cells and flagging hidden explosives. Use numbered clues to deduce where every mine lurks — one wrong click ends it all.

achievements.label: Speed Demon
achievements.desc: Clear Recruit difficulty in under 30 seconds

achievements.label: Flag Master
achievements.desc: Place 250 total flags across all games

games.title: Serpent
games.description: Guide your ever-growing serpent through a grid of food and obstacles. Eat, grow, dodge your own tail — and don't stop until you've filled the board.

achievements.label: High Scorer
achievements.desc: Score 500 points in a single run

achievements.label: Big Eater
achievements.desc: Score 1000 points in a single run

achievements.label: Long Boi
achievements.desc: Reach a snake length of 50 in a single game

achievements.label: Century
achievements.desc: Reach a snake length of 100 in a single game

games.title: Solitaire Card Parlor
games.description: Six classic solitaire games at one felt-green table. From Klondike to Spider, FreeCell to Pyramid — deal, shuffle, and solve your way through a full card parlor.

achievements.label: First Deal
achievements.desc: Play your first game in the parlor

achievements.label: First Victory
achievements.desc: Win any solitaire game for the first time

achievements.label: Speed Demon
achievements.desc: Win any game in under 3 minutes

achievements.label: Full House
achievements.desc: Play all six game variants at least once

achievements.label: Spider Slayer
achievements.desc: Complete a full game of Spider Solitaire

games.title: Coldmere Manor
games.description: Navigate a procedurally-generated haunted manor in first-person. Extinguish three candles per floor to unlock the exit — but the entity that guards them does not forgive.

achievements.label: Into the Manor
achievements.desc: Die for the first time — courage has a cost

achievements.label: Shadow
achievements.desc: Hide inside a cabinet to evade the entity

achievements.label: Speed Demon
achievements.desc: Clear a floor in under 90 seconds

games.title: Rhino Pile-Up
games.description: A hot-seat climbing brawl up a giant stone rhino. Take turns hauling a ragdoll climber higher than the last — clear the bar without freezing in the red OUT zone. Last climber to raise the mark wins.

achievements.label: Off the Ground
achievements.desc: Raise the bar to 10 m in a single climb

achievements.label: High Climber
achievements.desc: Raise the bar to 25 m in a single climb

achievements.label: Summit Conqueror
achievements.desc: Raise the bar to 50 m in a single climb

achievements.label: Seasoned Scaler
achievements.desc: Complete 50 successful climbs across all matches

games.title: Catan
games.description: Settle the island: gather wood, brick, sheep, wheat, and ore to build roads, settlements, and cities on a randomized hex board. Play online with 3–6 friends via room codes, battle AI bots, or pass-and-play local hot-seat — first to 10 victory points wins.

achievements.label: Settler
achievements.desc: Place your first settlement in setup

achievements.label: City Builder
achievements.desc: Upgrade a settlement into a city

achievements.label: Full Table
achievements.desc: Start a 5–6 player game on the big board

achievements.label: Catan Master
achievements.desc: Win a game by reaching 10 victory points

games.title: Cup of Duck
games.description: A determined mallard climbs ever upward — through a tree, a house, the Lincoln Memorial, and an alien UFO — to reach a refreshing cup of berry water. Double-jump, glide, and slow-mo past spikes, spiders, falling acorns, and laser beams across four hand-built levels.

achievements.label: Cup of Duck
achievements.desc: Beat Level 4 and finish the game

games.title: Floe Fighters
games.description: A 3D penguin sumo brawl on a shrinking ice floe. Lob fish-bombs to blast rivals into the freezing sea — last waddler standing wins. Battle up to 4 friends online, or take on endless waves solo in Survival.

achievements.label: Fish Tycoon
achievements.desc: Score 5,000 points in a Survival run

achievements.label: Frostbite Fortune
achievements.desc: Score 20,000 points in a Survival run

achievements.label: Glacier Magnate
achievements.desc: Score 50,000 points in a Survival run

globalAchievements.label: Online Victory
globalAchievements.desc: Win your first online multiplayer match
